unit.note: server full vitest 1564/1564 + client full vitest 1567/1567 + tsc --noEmit clean (both workspaces) + oxlint clean (3 touched source files warning-free; only pre-existing unrelated warnings remain).

e2e.note: surface=web via surface_verification.py: campaign-board-live-progress.spec.ts (status.json pending + loop_state in_progress -> board renders data-step-status=in_progress + spinner + label; B0 stays complete) + campaign-attached-run-guard.spec.ts (PR #116 regression re-run). Real stack: built SPA served by Hono on :3998 + real POST /api/projects seeding.

surface_verification.runner: node client/node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test client/e2e/flows/campaign-board-live-progress.spec.ts client/e2e/flows/campaign-attached-run-guard.spec.ts --config=client/playwright.config.ts (BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3998; single-process isolated stack: built client/dist via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR + tsx server, temp USERPROFILE, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local)
surface_verification.justification: Backend-affects-frontend read-surface change (Campaign.steps[].status on GET /api/campaigns is consumed by the board); web mandatory at medium. The E2E proves the loop_state -> readLoopRunState overlay -> CampaignLaneCard render chain over the real HTTP wire, and re-runs #116's guard spec as a regression check.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1 readLoopRunState collects live unit {slug,id} into attachedSlugs + runningStepIdsBySlug
behaviors.evidence: campaign-loop-state.test.ts (id-map, multi-unit grouping per/across campaigns, slug-without-id attaches slug only)

behaviors.behavior: AC-2 readLoopAttachments delegates with byte-identical behavior
behaviors.evidence: campaign-loop-state.test.ts (12 pre-existing readLoopAttachments cases unchanged + green)

behaviors.behavior: AC-3 route overlays pending->in_progress for the named step; done/total/nextPending invariant; loop_state read exactly once
behaviors.evidence: campaigns.test.ts overlay test + single-read vi.spyOn consistency test

behaviors.behavior: AC-4 overlay never downgrades an authoritative complete/failed/escalated step
behaviors.evidence: campaigns.test.ts 'never downgrades an authoritative non-pending step'

behaviors.behavior: AC-5 tolerant empty snapshot (missing/torn/stale); route never 500s
AC-6 CampaignLaneCard renders in_progress step distinctly (spinner aria-label + label, beats next-marker)
